what_it_does: This file is a channel-memory attachment record that links an attachment identifier to a specific board item in the dragnet-development channel, storing metadata such as id, channel, attachment_type, target URI, and an added timestamp.
observations: The file contains only YAML frontmatter and no body content.
target is a board:// URI pointing to item-af2492c8.
standouts: References a board item via a board:// URI.
Pure metadata record with no payload content.
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter for structured metadata.
Uses a board:// URI scheme to identify the target artifact.
Uses an ISO 8601 timestamp with timezone.
Follows a file-local ledger/attachment record pattern.
concerns: The target board item is referenced but not present or described in this file.
There is no payload or explanation of what is actually attached.
The reference could be dangling if the target board item is missing or changed.
notes: A timestamped metadata stub that records an attachment link from the dragnet-development channel to board item item-af2492c8.
questions: What content or artifact is actually attached to the board item?
What is the semantic relationship between this attachment and the target board item?
Who created this attachment and why?
Is the referenced board://item-af2492c8 still valid?
purpose_vs_actual: The file functions as a channel attachment ledger entry; its content matches that expected purpose.
apparent_themes: Traceability between channel memory and board items.
intention_signals: It appears to be trying to create a durable, timestamped association between a channel attachment and a board item so the relationship can be looked up later.
contribution: Provides a typed, timestamped link between a channel attachment identifier and a board item, contributing a traceable association that a fused system can use to navigate between channel memory and board artifacts.
summary_for_embedding: A YAML-frontmatter channel attachment record in dragnet-development that links attachment att-46b7b76a to board item item-af2492c8 with a 2026-06-24 timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: This file was intended to record that a board item had an attachment in the dragnet-development channel at a specific point in time.
